title: The public sours on AI and data centers as Anthropic, OpenAI look to IPO and tech keeps spending
summary_full: Negativity around AI could be a drag on OpenAI and Anthropic as the startups look to go public, and will likely be a major issue in the midterm elections.
summary_public: Negativity around AI could be a drag on OpenAI and Anthropic as the startups look to go public, and will likely be a major issue in the midterm elections.
